monday.description: Pan-seared surimi mixed with steamed bamboo shoots and served with rye berries, finished with mayonnaise.

tuesday.description: Grilled salmon fillet served with roasted daikon radish and barbari bread, seasoned with karashi mustard powder.

wednesday.description: Slow-cooked venison with strozzapreti pasta and eggplant, flavored with ground curry powder.

thursday.description: Marinated squid grilled and served with whole grain spelt and pea shoots, finished with reduced-sodium barbecue sauce.

friday.description: Pan-seared herring served with roasted bitter gourd and chapati, topped with ranch dressing.

monday.description: Roasted napa cabbage and cantal cheese served over quick-cook brown basmati rice, finished with low-fat strained Greek yogurt.

tuesday.description: Grilled shiitake mushrooms and sliced panela cheese served with pain de campagne, drizzled with vegetable stock.

wednesday.description: Sauteed onions and mung beans mixed with gluten-free macaroni, flavored with reduced-sodium pizza sauce.

thursday.description: Slow-cooked split peas and shiitake mushrooms served over organic red rice, seasoned with dried arbol chiles.

friday.description: Pan-seared pressed tofu served with roasted radishes and paratha, finished with reduced-sodium vegetable gravy.
